case_title: LEE MAR TIN VS BRONGOS PETER/CLEMENT PRODUCE MARKET

AS FOLLOWS:$80. FOR HOSP. $107 DR'S BILL; REMAINDER PAIN & SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF AUG-01-1996, DENIED
